chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.S-568 of 2025 Muhammad Ikram (since deceased) through his L.Rs. Versus Khalid Ahmed alias Aftab & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 4697/25 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 14.10.2025 Mr. Farhan Ali, advocate for Petitioner. -.-.- On instructions, counsel for the petitioner, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application with no orders as to costs. Judge
